chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 846 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3566/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2023 Mr. Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that he would be satisfied and not press the petition if the Inspector General of Police, Sindh is directed to expedite the enquiry pending against the petitioners, who are police officials, and decide the same within a period of thirty days. On the other hand, learned AAG submits that enquiry against the petitioners has already been completed and report has been submitted which fact however has been disputed by learned Counsel for petitioners, who has filed a statement today along with an order purportedly showing that one Muhammad Younis Chandio, PSP, DIGP IT Directorate Sindh, Karachi has been nominated as Head of Enquiry Committee to conduct regular departmental enquiry against 37 police officers/personnel of Larkana and Sukkur Range for their involvement in smuggling of Iranian oil, non-custom paid vehicles and other contraband articles. In any case, if any enquiry, as above, is pending against the petitioners, the same may be expedited and preferably concluded within a period of thirty days. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application as not pressed in above terms. Let a copy of this order be communicated to learned Additional Advocate General Sindh for perusal and compliance.

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application as not pressed in above terms. Let a copy of this order be communicated to learned Additional Advocate General Sindh for perusal and compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
